requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment Route — Self-Declaration (Module A / Internal Production Control)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定路径——自我声明（模块A / 内部生产控制）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定路徑——自我聲明（模組A / 內部生產控制）

summary.en: No direct equivalent. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is a mandatory domestic market-access scheme administered by CNCA/CQC; it does not grant EU market access or substitute for CE conformity assessment. Some Chinese manufacturers obtain voluntary third-party CB Scheme or TÜV/BV test reports to support an EU self-declaration, but this is not legally mandated.
summary.zh: 无直接等价制度。中国强制认证（CCC）是由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）/ 中国质量认证中心（CQC）管理的境内市场准入制度，不赋予欧盟市场准入资格，亦不能替代CE合格评定。部分中国制造商自愿获取CB体系或TÜV/BV检测报告以支撑欧盟自我声明，但此举不属法定要求。
summary.zht: 無直接等價制度。中國強制認證（CCC）是由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）/中國品質認證中心（CQC）管理的境內市場準入制度，不賦予歐盟市場準入資格，亦不能替代CE合格評定。部分中國製造商自願取得CB體系或TÜV/BV檢測報告以支撐歐盟自我聲明，但此舉不屬法定要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC — GB/T 4943.1 (ITE safety), GB/T 17626 series (EMC, based on IEC 61000)
GB/T 37408-2019 (photovoltaic inverter, domestic standard)
CNCA certification catalogue (光伏逆变器不在CCC强制目录内 — PV inverters are currently NOT on the CCC mandatory catalogue)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers familiar only with CCC (or no mandatory scheme for inverters) must understand that CE self-declaration requires the manufacturer to be technically responsible and to hold a compliant technical file demonstrating conformity with all applicable EU legal requirements. Harmonised standards such as EN 62109-1/-2 are voluntary presumption-of-conformity tools, not mandatory or exclusive standards.
gap.zh: 仅熟悉CCC（或针对逆变器无强制认证要求）的中国制造商须认识到，CE自我声明要求制造商承担技术责任，并持有证明符合所有适用欧盟法律要求的完整技术文件。EN 62109-1/-2等协调标准是自愿的符合性推定工具，并非强制或唯一标准。
gap.zht: 僅熟悉CCC（或針對逆變器無強制認證要求）的中國製造商須認識到，CE自我聲明要求製造商承擔技術責任，並持有證明符合所有適用歐盟法律要求的完整技術文件。EN 62109-1/-2等協調標準是自願的符合性推定工具，並非強制或唯一標準。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory legal obligation: where LVD/EMC apply, the manufacturer must complete the applicable conformity assessment, technical documentation, EU DoC, and CE marking before EU market placement. Module A is the normal route for standard PV inverters under LVD/EMC; harmonised standards used within that file are voluntary presumption-of-conformity routes.
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for EU entry — CCC covers domestic China market only.

source.publisher: European Commission — DG GROW, Internal Market, Industry, Entrepreneurship and SMEs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational: Self-declaration under Module A is the standard conformity assessment route for grid-tied PV inverters in the EU. No Notified Body is required under LVD or EMC alone, but the manufacturer must hold all supporting technical evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考：模块A自我声明是欧盟并网光伏逆变器的标准合格评定路径。仅依据LVD和EMC指令，无需通知机构，但制造商必须持有全部技术佐证材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考：模組A自我聲明是歐盟並網光伏逆變器的標準合格評定路徑。僅依據LVD及EMC指令，無需通知機構，但製造商必須持有全部技術佐證材料。

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters are subject to the Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU) and the EMC Directive (2014/30/EU). Both directives permit conformity assessment via Module A (internal production control): the manufacturer carries out the assessment, compiles a technical file, issues an EU Declaration of Conformity, and affixes the CE mark — without involving a Notified Body. A Notified Body is not required for standard PV inverters under LVD or EMC.
summary.zh: 并网光伏逆变器须符合《低压指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）和《电磁兼容指令》（2014/30/EU）。两项指令均允许通过模块A（内部生产控制）进行合格评定：制造商自行开展评定、汇编技术文件、签发欧盟合格声明并加贴CE标志，无需通知机构介入。标准光伏逆变器在LVD或EMC框架下均不强制要求通知机构参与。
summary.zht: 並網光伏逆變器須符合《低壓指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）及《電磁相容指令》（2014/30/EU）。兩項指令均允許透過模組A（內部生產控制）進行合格評定：製造商自行開展評定、彙編技術文件、簽發歐盟合格聲明並加貼CE標誌，無需通知機構介入。標準光伏逆變器在LVD或EMC框架下均不強制要求通知機構參與。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Annex III (Module A)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC) — Annex II (Module A)
Decision No 768/2008/EC — Module A definition
EN 62109-1 / EN 62109-2 (safety of power converters for PV systems, harmonised under LVD)

requirement_topic.en: EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and Technical File — Drafting and Retention
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟合格声明（DoC）与技术文件——起草与留存
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟合格聲明（DoC）與技術文件——起草與留存

summary.en: No direct equivalent for EU purposes. China's product certification regime (CCC) generates a CCC certificate and test reports, but not a CE-format DoC or a technical file structured to EU requirements. Internally, Chinese manufacturers may maintain product quality files (产品质量档案) under GB/T 19001 (ISO 9001) QMS, which can partially overlap but are not interchangeable.
summary.zh: 无直接等价文件（就欧盟要求而言）。中国产品认证体系（CCC）产生CCC证书和测试报告，但不产生CE格式的合格声明，也不产生按照欧盟要求构建的技术文件。国内制造商在GB/T 19001（ISO 9001）质量管理体系下或维护产品质量档案，与欧盟技术文件部分重叠，但不可相互替代。
summary.zht: 無直接等價文件（就歐盟要求而言）。中國產品認證體系（CCC）產生CCC證書和測試報告，但不產生CE格式的合格聲明，亦不產生按照歐盟要求構建的技術文件。國內製造商在GB/T 19001（ISO 9001）質量管理體系下或維護產品品質檔案，與歐盟技術文件部分重疊，但不可相互替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19001-2016 (ISO 9001:2015 equivalent — QMS, not a regulatory file requirement)
CCC certification documentation (CNCA-C17 series)

gap.en: Most Chinese inverter factories do not maintain a CE-format DoC or a structured EU technical file as a living document. Test reports may exist for harmonised standards but are often not consolidated into a signed, directive-specific DoC. The 10-year retention obligation and on-demand provision requirement are frequently overlooked.
gap.zh: 大多数中国逆变器制造商既未以CE格式维护合格声明，也未将欧盟技术文件作为动态文件持续维护。协调标准测试报告或有存档，但往往未被整合为经签署的、按指令分类的合格声明。十年留存义务及按需提供要求则普遍被忽视。
gap.zht: 大多數中國逆變器製造商既未以CE格式維護合格聲明，亦未將歐盟技術文件作為動態文件持續維護。協調標準測試報告或有存檔，但往往未被整合為經簽署的、按指令分類的合格聲明。十年留存義務及按需提供要求則普遍被忽視。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory — DoC must be issued and signed before CE mark is affixed; technical file must be compiled before market placement and retained for 10 years.
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent obligation for domestic market. CCC certificate retention governed by CNCA rules (typically 5 years per certificate cycle).

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational: The DoC and technical file are foundational documents — without them, CE marking is legally invalid regardless of whether the product meets technical requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考：合格声明与技术文件是基础性文件——无论产品在技术上是否符合要求，缺少此类文件均导致CE标志在法律上无效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考：合格聲明與技術文件是基礎性文件——無論產品在技術上是否符合要求，缺少此類文件均導致CE標誌在法律上無效。

summary.en: Before placing a PV inverter on the EU market, the manufacturer must (1) draw up an EU Declaration of Conformity listing applicable directives, harmonised standards applied, manufacturer name/address, and a legally binding signature; and (2) compile a technical file covering product description, design drawings, risk assessment, test reports, and conformity assessment results. Both must be retained for at least 10 years from the date the last unit is placed on the market and made available to market surveillance authorities on request.
summary.zh: 在将光伏逆变器投放欧盟市场之前，制造商须：（1）起草欧盟合格声明，列明适用指令、所采用的协调标准、制造商名称及地址，并附具有法律约束力的签名；（2）汇编技术文件，内容涵盖产品描述、设计图纸、风险评估、测试报告及合格评定结果。上述文件须自最后一件产品投放市场之日起至少保存十年，并须应市场监督机关要求提供查阅。
summary.zht: 在將光伏逆變器投放歐盟市場之前，製造商須：（1）起草歐盟合格聲明，列明適用指令、所採用的協調標準、製造商名稱及地址，並附具有法律約束力的簽名；（2）彙編技術文件，內容涵蓋產品描述、設計圖紙、風險評估、測試報告及合格評定結果。上述文件須自最後一件產品投放市場之日起至少保存十年，並須應市場監督機關要求提供查閱。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Article 15, Annex IV
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC) — Article 14, Annex IV
Decision No 768/2008/EC — Annex II (DoC template)
Regulation (EC) No 765/2008 — Article 5 (traceability obligations)

requirement_topic.zh: 经济经营者义务——欧盟境内责任人（法规(EU) 2019/1020）
requirement_topic.zht: 經濟經營者義務——歐盟境內責任人（法規(EU) 2019/1020）

summary.en: No equivalent. China's domestic market does not require a foreign-established responsible person for Chinese-manufactured products. Export compliance in China is handled by the manufacturer or a licensed export agent (报关行); no standing EU-representative obligation exists under Chinese law.
summary.zh: 无等价制度。中国境内市场对中国制造产品不要求设立境外责任人。中国出口合规由制造商或持牌报关行负责，中国法律框架下不存在设立欧盟常驻代表的义务。
summary.zht: 無等價制度。中國境內市場對中國製造產品不要求設立境外責任人。中國出口合規由製造商或持牌報關行負責，中國法律框架下不存在設立歐盟常駐代表的義務。

standards_or_laws: PRC Customs Law (海关法) — export declaration obligations
PRC Foreign Trade Law (对外贸易法) — general export framework

gap.en: Many Chinese inverter manufacturers export to the EU through third-party trading companies or distributors without formally appointing an EU Authorised Representative or ensuring the importer accepts the Article 4 responsible-person role. If no qualifying economic operator is established in the EU, the product legally cannot be placed on the EU market regardless of technical compliance.
gap.zh: 许多中国逆变器制造商通过第三方贸易公司或经销商向欧盟出口，却未正式委任欧盟授权代表，也未确保进口商承担第4条所规定的责任人角色。若欧盟境内不存在符合条件的经济经营者，则无论产品技术上是否合规，均依法不得投放欧盟市场。
gap.zht: 許多中國逆變器製造商透過第三方貿易公司或經銷商向歐盟出口，卻未正式委任歐盟授權代表，亦未確保進口商承擔第4條所規定的責任人角色。若歐盟境內不存在符合條件的經濟經營者，則無論產品技術上是否合規，均依法不得投放歐盟市場。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory from 16 July 2021 — applicable to all products covered by EU harmonisation legislation listed in Annex I of Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 (includes LVD and EMC directives).
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent outbound obligation under Chinese law.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex — Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational: Absence of an EU-established responsible person is a hard market-access blocker under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — it cannot be remedied solely by obtaining test certificates or issuing a DoC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考：欧盟境内无责任人是法规(EU) 2019/1020项下的硬性市场准入障碍，仅凭取得测试证书或签发合格声明无法解决此问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考：歐盟境內無責任人是法規(EU) 2019/1020項下的硬性市場準入障礙，僅憑取得測試證書或簽發合格聲明無法解決此問題。

summary.en: Under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 (Market Surveillance and Compliance of Products), applicable from 16 July 2021, products covered by EU harmonisation legislation — including LVD and EMC — may only be placed on the EU market if there is an economic operator established in the EU who is responsible for Article 4 tasks. For a non-EU manufacturer (e.g., a Chinese inverter maker), this means appointing one of: (a) an EU Authorised Representative (AR) mandated by the manufacturer; (b) an importer established in the EU; or (c) a fulfilment service provider established in the EU. The responsible person must keep the DoC and technical file available, cooperate with market surveillance authorities, and notify them of non-compliance risks.
summary.zh: 根据2021年7月16日起适用的《欧盟市场监督与产品合规法规》(EU) 2019/1020，受欧盟协调立法（包括LVD和EMC指令）约束的产品，仅在欧盟境内存在承担第4条职责的经济经营者时，方可在欧盟市场销售。对于非欧盟制造商（如中国逆变器制造商），这意味着须指定以下三类主体之一：（a）由制造商授权的欧盟授权代表（AR）；（b）在欧盟境内设立的进口商；或（c）在欧盟境内设立的履行服务提供商。责任人须保存合格声明及技术文件以备查阅，与市场监督机关配合，并就不合规风险及时通报。
summary.zht: 根據2021年7月16日起適用的《歐盟市場監督與產品合規法規》(EU) 2019/1020，受歐盟協調立法（包括LVD及EMC指令）約束的產品，僅在歐盟境內存在承擔第4條職責的經濟經營者時，方可在歐盟市場銷售。對於非歐盟製造商（如中國逆變器製造商），這意味著須指定以下三類主體之一：（a）由製造商授權的歐盟授權代表（AR）；（b）在歐盟境內設立的進口商；或（c）在歐盟境內設立的履行服務提供商。責任人須保存合格聲明及技術文件以備查閱，與市場監督機關配合，並就不合規風險及時通報。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — Article 4 (responsible person), Article 5 (obligations of importers)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — Article 3(13) (definition of authorised representative)
Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Article 12 (importer obligations)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC) — Article 12 (importer obligations)

requirement_topic.en: On-Product Labelling and Marking — CE Mark, Manufacturer Identification, and Traceability
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标识与标注——CE标志、制造商识别信息及可追溯性
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標識與標注——CE標誌、製造商識別資訊及可追溯性

summary.en: For the domestic Chinese market, inverters must carry CCC marking (where applicable — note PV inverters are currently not on the mandatory CCC catalogue) and comply with labelling requirements under GB standards. Chinese national standard GB/T 191 governs packaging pictorial marks. The CCC mark (3C mark) is the visual equivalent for Chinese domestic sales but has no legal standing in the EU.
summary.zh: 针对中国境内市场，逆变器须加贴CCC标志（适用时——注意光伏逆变器目前不在CCC强制目录内），并符合国家标准的标签要求。GB/T 191规范了包装图示标志。CCC标志（3C标志）是中国境内销售的视觉等价物，但在欧盟无法律效力。
summary.zht: 針對中國境內市場，逆變器須加貼CCC標誌（適用時——注意光伏逆變器目前不在CCC強制目錄內），並符合國家標準的標籤要求。GB/T 191規範了包裝圖示標誌。CCC標誌（3C標誌）是中國境內銷售的視覺等價物，但在歐盟無法律效力。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (safety of IT equipment — used as reference for CCC)
GB/T 191-2008 (packaging pictorial marks)
CNCA mandatory catalogue (目录外产品不需CCC — products outside the catalogue do not require CCC)

gap.en: Chinese factory labels typically show Chinese-language information and domestic certification marks. The EU-required manufacturer postal address (often a European subsidiary or AR address), EU-language product information, and correct CE mark geometry are frequently absent from factory-default labelling, requiring label rework before EU shipment.
gap.zh: 中国工厂标签通常仅含中文信息及国内认证标志。欧盟要求的制造商邮政地址（通常为欧洲子公司或授权代表地址）、欧盟语言产品信息及符合规格的CE标志，往往在出厂默认标签中缺失，须在发往欧盟前重新制作标签。
gap.zht: 中國工廠標籤通常僅含中文資訊及國內認證標誌。歐盟要求的製造商郵政地址（通常為歐洲子公司或授權代表地址）、歐盟語言產品資訊及符合規格的CE標誌，往往在出廠預設標籤中缺失，須在發往歐盟前重新製作標籤。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory — CE marking and traceability information must be present before the product is placed on the EU market. Absence constitutes non-compliance and may trigger market surveillance enforcement.
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic Chinese labelling requirements are mandatory for China market only; no CE-equivalent obligation for export products under Chinese law.

source.publisher: European Commission — DG GROW, Internal Market, Industry, Entrepreneurship and SMEs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational: CE marking placement and traceability labelling are visible, inspectable requirements. Non-compliant labels are among the most common findings in EU market surveillance campaigns on electrical products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考：CE标志的贴附与可追溯性标签是显性、可查验的要求。不合规标签是欧盟针对电气产品开展市场监督行动时最常见的问题之一。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考：CE標誌的貼附與可追溯性標籤是顯性、可查驗的要求。不合規標籤是歐盟針對電氣產品開展市場監督行動時最常見的問題之一。

summary.en: Before placing a PV inverter on the EU market, the manufacturer must physically affix the CE marking to the product (preferred) or to its packaging or accompanying documents. The CE mark must be visible, legible, and indelible, with a minimum height of 5 mm and proportional letters. In addition, the product or its packaging must bear: (1) the manufacturer's name, registered trade name, or trademark and postal address; (2) a type, batch, serial, or model number for identification; (3) the importer's name and EU address (if different from manufacturer). If a Notified Body is not involved (standard for PV inverters), no NB number appears. The EU Authorised Representative's contact details should also appear if one is appointed.
summary.zh: 将光伏逆变器投放欧盟市场前，制造商须在产品上（优先）或其包装或随附文件上物理性地加贴CE标志。CE标志须清晰可见、易于辨认且持久耐用，最小高度为5毫米，字母比例须保持一致。此外，产品或包装还须标注：（1）制造商名称、注册商号或商标及邮政地址；（2）供识别用的型号、批次、序列或型号编号；（3）进口商名称及欧盟地址（如与制造商不同）。若未涉及通知机构（光伏逆变器的标准情形），则无需显示通知机构编号。如已委任欧盟授权代表，亦须标注其联系方式。
summary.zht: 將光伏逆變器投放歐盟市場前，製造商須在產品上（優先）或其包裝或隨附文件上物理性地加貼CE標誌。CE標誌須清晰可見、易於辨認且持久耐用，最小高度為5毫米，字母比例須保持一致。此外，產品或包裝還須標注：（1）製造商名稱、注冊商號或商標及郵政地址；（2）供識別用的型號、批次、序列或型號編號；（3）進口商名稱及歐盟地址（如與製造商不同）。若未涉及通知機構（光伏逆變器的標準情形），則無需顯示通知機構編號。如已委任歐盟授權代表，亦須標注其聯繫方式。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EC) No 765/2008 — Article 30 (CE marking general principles)
Decision No 768/2008/EC — Annex II (CE marking rules)
Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Article 8(6) (manufacturer marking obligations)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC) — Article 8(4) (manufacturer marking obligations)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — Article 4(4)(c) (responsible person contact details on product)

requirement_topic.en: [政治敏感] EU Public-Funding Exclusion for High-Risk-Country Inverters — Commission Policy (effective 1 May 2026)
requirement_topic.zh: [政治敏感] 欧盟公共资金排除高风险国家逆变器——欧委会政策（2026年5月1日起生效）
requirement_topic.zht: [政治敏感] 歐盟公共資金排除高風險國家逆變器——歐委會政策（2026年5月1日起生效）

summary.en: No equivalent Chinese regulatory measure. China's Ministry of Commerce has publicly objected to the EU's characterisation of China as a high-risk country and stated the measures lack factual basis. Chinese inverter manufacturers (including Huawei FusionSolar, Sungrow, Growatt, Ginlong/Solis) continue to sell in the EU private market, which is not covered by the reported public-funding restrictions.
summary.zh: 中国方面无等价监管措施。中国商务部已公开反对欧盟将中国列为高风险国家，并声明相关措施缺乏事实依据。中国逆变器制造商（包括华为智能光伏、阳光电源、古瑞瓦特、锦浪科技等）在欧盟私营市场继续销售，该市场不受上述据报道的公共资金限制措施约束。
summary.zht: 中國方面無等價監管措施。中國商務部已公開反對歐盟將中國列為高風險國家，並聲明相關措施缺乏事實依據。中國逆變器製造商（包括華為智能光伏、陽光電源、古瑞瓦特、錦浪科技等）在歐盟私營市場繼續銷售，該市場不受上述據報道的公共資金限制措施約束。

standards_or_laws: PRC Ministry of Commerce statement on EU inverter measures (May 2026 — press reported, not yet traceable to official MOFCOM document as of access date)

gap.en: Because this is unverified non-regulatory market intelligence, not an official EU legal requirement and not an official EU mandate, no confirmed conformity-assessment gap is identified. Private-market CE access under LVD/EMC is unaffected. Manufacturers may monitor official EU sources for any future legal instrument.
gap.zh: 由于这属于未经核实的非监管市场情报，并非欧盟官方法律要求，也不是欧盟官方强制要求，因此未确认存在合格评定差距。LVD/EMC框架下的私营市场CE准入不受影响。制造商可持续监测欧盟官方来源是否发布未来法律文书。
gap.zht: 由於這屬於未經核實的非監管市場情報，並非歐盟官方法律要求，也不是歐盟官方強制要求，因此未確認存在合格評定差距。LVD/EMC框架下的私營市場CE准入不受影響。製造商可持續監測歐盟官方來源是否發布未來法律文書。

mandatory_status.target: Not an official regulatory requirement (unverified market intelligence)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union — Foreign Subsidies Regulation (official related legal context; no official inverter-specific exclusion identified)

compliance_verdict.en: [POLITICALLY SENSITIVE / INFORMATIONAL] No official EU legal instrument establishing a China-inverter public-funding exclusion has been identified in the Official Journal as of the access date. Treat industry reporting as unverified market intelligence only. Private-market CE access under LVD/EMC is unaffected unless a binding official measure is later adopted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【政治敏感／仅供参考】截至访问日期，尚未在欧盟官方公报中确认设立中国逆变器公共资金排除的正式欧盟法律文件。行业报道仅应作为未经核实的市场情报处理。除非后续通过具有约束力的官方措施，否则LVD/EMC框架下的私营市场CE准入不受影响。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【政治敏感／僅供參考】截至訪問日期，尚未在歐盟官方公報中確認設立中國逆變器公共資金排除的正式歐盟法律文件。行業報道僅應作為未經核實的市場情報處理。除非後續通過具有約束力的官方措施，否則LVD/EMC框架下的私營市場CE准入不受影響。

summary.en: [政治敏感] Unverified non-regulatory market intelligence, not an official EU legal requirement and not an official EU mandate. Industry reporting has described a possible European Commission public-funding exclusion affecting energy projects that incorporate inverters or power conversion systems (PCS) from designated high-risk countries, but the cited source is non-official and no formal EU legal requirement has been identified in the Official Journal as of the access date. Treat this row as market-intelligence monitoring only; private-market CE access under LVD/EMC is unaffected.
summary.zh: [政治敏感] 未经核实的非监管市场情报，并非欧盟官方法律要求，也不是欧盟官方强制要求。行业报道曾描述欧盟委员会可能对含有来自指定高风险国家逆变器或功率转换系统（PCS）的能源项目实施公共资金排除，但所引用来源并非官方来源，且截至访问日期未在《欧盟官方公报》中确认正式欧盟法律要求。本行仅作为市场情报监测；LVD/EMC框架下的私营市场CE准入不受影响。
summary.zht: [政治敏感] 未經核實的非監管市場情報，並非歐盟官方法律要求，也不是歐盟官方強制要求。行業報道曾描述歐盟委員會可能對含有來自指定高風險國家逆變器或功率轉換系統（PCS）的能源項目實施公共資金排除，但所引用來源並非官方來源，且截至訪問日期未在《歐盟官方公報》中確認正式歐盟法律要求。本行僅作為市場情報監測；LVD/EMC框架下的私營市場CE准入不受影響。

standards_or_laws: Unverified non-regulatory market intelligence on possible high-risk-country inverter exclusion from public funding (non-official industry reporting; no formal OJ regulation text identified as of 2026-06-11)
Regulation (EU) 2022/2560 — Foreign Subsidies Regulation (in force, related legal context)
Regulation (EU) 2022/2560 — Foreign Subsidies Regulation (in force, related context)
EU Cybersecurity Act — Regulation (EU) 2019/881 (existing framework, referenced in policy debate)
